title: calamus tenuis
intro: Calamus tenuis, also known as Lesser Calamus, is a type of plant in the family Zingiberaceae, which is a group of plants that includes ginger, turmeric, and cardamom. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calamus tenuis include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Calamus tenuis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
